title: MT Random Block Placement
description: Simple placement of random blocks from hotbar
body:
# MT Random Block Placement

**MT Random Block Placement** allows you to place blocks randomly from your hotbar with a simple press of a button (default: **R**). This mod is designed to enhance your building experience by adding a fun, random element to block placement.

## Features

- **Random Block Placement**: Press the default button **R** to place blocks randomly from your hotbar.
- **Client-Side Only**: This mod is client-based, meaning it does not require server installation and works independently on the client.

## How It Works

- The mod activates if you have more than one slot filled in your hotbar.
- Random block placement is enabled through the mod’s settings, providing a dynamic and unpredictable building experience.

## Demonstration

![Demo](https://i.imgur.com/AmCmQSM.gif)
